coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Relax. Breathe. Enjoy the ride. 6:00 of engine-building.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Aerobic base building. 75% for 6:00. This is the foundation of all fitness.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Building the base. 6:00 at 75%. This is where champions are made.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 75% for 6:00. So easy you could do this all day. (Please don't.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Starting threshold work. 90% for 9:00. This should hurt just enough.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First threshold block. 90-90% FTP. Settle in — don't overcook the start.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Starting threshold work. This is the bread and butter of cycling fitness. Embrace it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Block 1/4. 9:00 in the space between 'fine' and 'please make it stop.'
coachingNotes.MIXED: Starting: 90% for 9:00. Settle in. You can hold this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 2/8. You're 23% done. This is where average athletes quit. You're not average.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 2/8. 6 to go. You've accumulated 9min of supra-threshold work. Stay sharp on form.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 2/8. You're building something real here. 6 more opportunities to get stronger.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Set 1/4. The suffering is progressive, like a tax bracket.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Starting. 115% for 1:00. Controlled aggression. Lock in form early.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 5:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 24% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 55%, 85-95 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Block 2/4. The discomfort is the adaptation. Embrace it. 5 more blocks to build FTP.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Progressive fatigue building. 10min threshold work accumulated. Maintain 95-100 rpm — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Your body knows what to do at threshold. Trust your fitness. Block 2/4.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Block 2/4. Your legs are politely requesting a break. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 2/4. 35 minutes left. Maintain focus. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 44% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: VO2max interval. Breathing should be gasping. After this: 5min 0s recovery before next effort.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 44% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 44% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 44% done. 115% for 1:00. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 5:00 at 55%. This hurts because it's supposed to. Set the tone.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First rep: 5:00 at 55%. Focus on form and controlled execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 5:00 at 55%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 5:00 at 55%. This seemed like a good idea. We'll see.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 29 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 54% done. Your mind is weak. Your body is stronger. 22 minutes left.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 35 minutes in. 90% at 85-90 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 54% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 3 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 54% complete. Congratulations! You've found where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 54% done. Check your form. Relax shoulders. Maintain 90%.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 6/8. You're 64% done. This is where average athletes quit. You're not average.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 6/8. 1:00 at 115%. Cadence: 85-90 rpm. Seated. 2 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Deep into it: 64% done. This is where you separate from your past self. Dig deeper.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 2 reps to go. Your body is writing a strongly worded letter. You won't read it until after cooldown.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 64% complete. Rep 6/8. Fatigue is real — hold form. 115%, 85-90 rpm.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 66% done. 0 intervals left. 16 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 27min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 43 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 66% into session. 55%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 74% complete. Block 4/4. This is where you prove you're serious.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Block 4/4. 74% complete. Hold 90% steady. 10 minutes remain.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 74% complete. Block 4/4. This is where mediocre riders crack. You're pushing through.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 48 minutes in. Your lactate threshold called. It's filing a complaint.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 48 minutes in. You're in the zone. Keep breathing rhythmic. Block 4/4.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Last one. Your body is lying — you have more. Prove it. Then you can rest.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Last rep. 115-115% FTP, 90-100 rpm. Seated. Finish strong, then 9 minutes easy.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This one is harder than the last. That's exactly how it should be. You're adapting. You're improving.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Same power as last time, but you're way more tired. Progressive overload! *cries in watts*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Last rep. 115-115% FTP, 90-100 rpm, Seated. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 55 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 84% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 84% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 55% FTP × 5:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 92% done. 0 intervals left. 0 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 34min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 92% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 92% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
